targets.query:
from(bucket: "donnees-usine")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "etat_machines")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "machine_id"])

from(bucket: "donnees-usine")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "etat_machines")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "charge_travail")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "machine_id"])

from(bucket: "donnees-usine")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "predictions")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "probabilite_panne")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "machine_id"])

from(bucket: "donnees-usine")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "anomalies_energie")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "valeur_actuelle")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "machine_id", "type_alerte"])
